name: team
description: Multi-agent orchestration, parallel story execution, and conductor track management.

commands.description: Optimize application stack using specialized optimization agents
Cross-component team bug diagnosis and fix
Parallel story execution via agent team with integrity checks
Agent team for parallel code review
Execute tasks from a track's implementation plan
Manage track lifecycle: archive, restore, delete, rename
Create a new track with specification and phased plan
Git-aware undo by logical work unit
Display project status, active tracks, and next actions

skills.description: Context-driven development, track management, workflow patterns, and handoff protocol
DevOps agent team coordination and multi-agent workflow patterns
